scripts.dev:all: pnpm run dev:api & pnpm run dev
scripts.dev:api:local: APP_ENV=local LOCAL_AUTH_BYPASS=true DEV_CLERK_USER_ID=clerk_test_user DEV_STORE_SLUG=test-store DATABASE_URL=postgresql://lojaveiculosv2:lojaveiculosv2_dev@localhost:54321/lojaveiculosv2 AUDIT_DATABASE_URL=postgresql://lojaveiculosv2_audit:lojaveiculosv2_audit_dev@localhost:54322/lojaveiculosv2_audit REPASSES_CRM_LOCAL_DEMO=true pnpm run dev:api
scripts.dev:all:local: pnpm run dev:api:local & pnpm run dev
scripts.dev:local: pnpm run db:up && pnpm run db:push:local && pnpm run db:seed:local && pnpm run dev:all:local
scripts.db:logs: COMPOSE_DISABLE_ENV_FILE=1 docker compose logs -f lojaveiculosv2-postgres lojaveiculosv2-audit-postgres
scripts.db:seed:local: COMPOSE_DISABLE_ENV_FILE=1 docker compose exec -T lojaveiculosv2-postgres psql -U lojaveiculosv2 -d lojaveiculosv2 -v ON_ERROR_STOP=1 -f /seed/vehicle-catalog.sql -f /seed/product-test-user.sql
scripts.db:up: COMPOSE_DISABLE_ENV_FILE=1 docker compose up -d --wait lojaveiculosv2-postgres lojaveiculosv2-audit-postgres
scripts.test:pre-commit: pnpm run test:dashboard-animation && pnpm run test:frontend-design
scripts.validate: pnpm run migration:validate-board && pnpm run migration:check-plan && pnpm run migration:inventory -- --check && pnpm run check:lines && pnpm run check:boundaries && pnpm run check:env && pnpm run check:db && pnpm run check:frontend && pnpm run check:frontend-composition && pnpm run check:services && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run lint && pnpm run test
